news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics Announces Late-Breaking Presentation of LEVEL Clinical Trial Data at ESC Congress 2026
news.summary: Tenax will present Phase 3 LEVEL trial results for oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in a Late-Breaking Clinical Science session at ESC Congress 2026 in Munich on August 29, with topline data now expected in August 2026 ahead of database lock and statistical analysis.

news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics Announces Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
news.summary: Tenax granted inducement stock option awards to three newly hired non-executive employees in accounting, clinical operations, and CMC/product development roles as it staffs up ahead of a potential TNX-103 launch.

news.headline: Tenax and Orion Secure Long-Term Levosimendan Supply Deal
news.summary: Tenax and Orion Corporation signed a five-year, auto-renewing supply agreement naming Orion the primary manufacturer of oral levosimendan (TNX-103), alongside a license amendment extending the deadline for U.S. regulatory approval to December 31, 2035.

news.headline: Tenax Therapeutics Added to Russell 2000 and Russell 3000E Indexes
news.summary: Tenax Therapeutics was added to the Russell 2000, Russell 3000E, and related Russell Microcap/Value benchmark indexes effective with FTSE Russell's June 2026 semi-annual US indexes reconstitution, broadening the stock's exposure to passive index-fund ownership ahead of the LEVEL data readout.

news.headline: Guggenheim Raises Tenax Therapeutics Price Target to $40 from $34
news.summary: Guggenheim reiterated its Buy rating on TENX and lifted its price target to $40 from $34 ahead of the Phase 3 LEVEL data readout.

news.headline: Piper Sandler Raises Tenax Therapeutics Price Target to $50 from $20; Chardan Initiates at Buy
news.summary: Piper Sandler raised its TENX price target to $50 (Overweight) citing confidence in the upcoming LEVEL trial data, the same day Chardan Capital initiated coverage with a Buy rating and $27 target.

catalysts.label: Phase 3 LEVEL topline data readout
catalysts.detail: Tenax now expects to report topline data from the registrational Phase 3 LEVEL trial of oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in PH-HFpEF in August 2026, pulled forward from prior Q3 2026 guidance.

catalysts.label: Late-breaking LEVEL data presentation at ESC Congress 2026
catalysts.detail: Full LEVEL trial results will be presented in a Late-Breaking Clinical Science session at the European Society of Cardiology Congress in Munich, presented by Prof. Sanjiv Shah, MD.

catalysts.label: LEVEL-2 global Phase 3 enrollment completion
catalysts.detail: The second registrational Phase 3 study (LEVEL-2, ~540 patients across 100+ sites in 15 countries) is expected to complete enrollment by the end of 2027.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 financial results
catalysts.detail: Tenax's next quarterly earnings report and corporate update is estimated for mid-August 2026, likely alongside or shortly after the LEVEL topline data disclosure.

pulse: Tenax Therapeutics is entering the pivotal stretch for oral levosimendan (TNX-103) in pulmonary hypertension due to HFpEF, with topline Phase 3 LEVEL data now pulled forward to August 2026 and a late-breaking full data presentation set for ESC Congress in Munich on August 29. The company has shored up its supply chain via a new long-term manufacturing deal with Orion, joined the Russell 2000/3000E indexes, and holds cash into Q1 2028, while sell-side sentiment has turned increasingly bullish with fresh price-target hikes (Piper Sandler to $50, Guggenheim to $40) and new coverage initiations ahead of the readout. The stock's near-term trajectory hinges almost entirely on whether the LEVEL trial hits its 6-minute-walk-distance primary endpoint, which would position TNX-103 as a potential first-in-class approved PH-HFpEF therapy.
